title: Paracaryum longiflorum
taxonomy: Paracaryum longiflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Paracaryum. The classification of Paracaryum longiflorum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Brassicales. Within the Brassicaceae family, it is closely related to other plants such as cabbage and mustard. The specific classification of Paracaryum longiflorum reflects its botanical relationships and evolutionary history.
